{"about":"PHP CS Fixer 3.95.8 Adalbertus by Fabien Potencier, Dariusz Ruminski and contributors.","files":[{"name":"app\/Foo.php","appliedFixers":["single_space_around_construct","method_argument_space","blank_line_after_opening_tag","braces_position","no_unused_imports","blank_line_before_statement","binary_operator_spaces"],"diff":"--- \/work\/app\/Foo.php\n+++ \/work\/app\/Foo.php\n@@ -1,14 +1,15 @@\n <?php\n+\n namespace App;\n-use   Illuminate\\Support\\Str;\n-use App\\Models\\User;\n \n class Foo\n {\n-    public function bar($x,$y) {\n-        if($x==$y){\n+    public function bar($x, $y)\n+    {\n+        if ($x == $y) {\n             return true;\n         }\n-        return   false;\n+\n+        return false;\n     }\n }\n"},{"name":"app\/Bar.php","appliedFixers":["modifier_keywords","class_definition","single_space_around_construct","blank_line_after_opening_tag","braces_position","statement_indentation","blank_line_after_namespace","blank_line_before_statement","binary_operator_spaces"],"diff":"--- \/work\/app\/Bar.php\n+++ \/work\/app\/Bar.php\n@@ -1,9 +1,14 @@\n <?php\n+\n namespace App;\n-class Bar {\n-function   baz() {\n-$a=1;\n-$b = 2;\n-return $a+$b;\n-}\n+\n+class Bar\n+{\n+    public function baz()\n+    {\n+        $a = 1;\n+        $b = 2;\n+\n+        return $a + $b;\n+    }\n }\n"}],"time":{"total":0},"memory":0}
